evidence: "If you want 3 films of outrageous stupidity and mess to laugh at, this is for you."
"A great western! Didn't try to be cute or fancy, just an old fashioned straight forward western."
"Good guys vs bad guys, no explosions, no social justice, just a good solid western story."
"I know some people hate when something different is tried but that's their hang-up."
"This movie does everything you expect a Rambo movie to do."
"The writing was very weak. The only reason this series lasted this long was the likeability and greatness of the actors."
"A collection of garbage vignettes, without any continuity of plot or character whatsoever."
"I don't get it. People talk bad about this movie-IDK why."
"The acting, the script, cinematography, story...everything first rate."
"The most I've laughed this year!! You want to forget what's going on? Highly recommend this movie."
"If you want some kind of life-changing encounter--wrong movie for you."
"This is the worst movie I've seen in a decade."

summary: The user enjoys comedies and action films, particularly those with straightforward narratives and fast pacing. They show a preference for visual spectacle but are less concerned with production quality and emotional depth.
